TRT Evaluation

Lab-driven testosterone
evaluation and care

A comprehensive, evaluation-first approach. We start with symptoms and labs — not a sales pitch. If TRT isn't right for you, we'll tell you.

Book a Visit
Our Process

Evaluation before everything

Symptom Evaluation

  • • Structured review of fatigue, mood, libido, concentration
  • • Full medical history and medications assessment
  • • Open discussion before any decisions

Lab-Based Assessment

  • • Testosterone panel: total, free testosterone, SHBG
  • • Comprehensive bloodwork including CBC
  • • Provider-led results review with clear explanation

Monitoring & Adjustments

  • • Regular follow-up check-ins if TRT is appropriate
  • • Individualized dose adjustments based on labs
  • • Periodic monitoring labs every 3–6 months

Honest evaluation,
not a sales funnel

Unlike many TRT clinics, we don't start with the assumption that you need testosterone. We start with your symptoms and your labs. If TRT isn't clinically appropriate, we'll be upfront about it.

Labs first

Decisions driven by your bloodwork, not assumptions.

Honest talk

We'll tell you if TRT isn't the right fit.

Ongoing care

Not a one-visit clinic. We monitor and adjust.

Common Questions

What to know

Can TRT be managed via telehealth?
Yes. Symptom evaluation, lab ordering, results review, and ongoing management can all be handled effectively through telehealth visits.
Do you accept insurance for TRT?
No. MBS Medical is a cash-pay practice. This keeps your care simple, private, and free from insurance-driven limitations.
What if I'm not a candidate for TRT?
We'll be upfront about it. If your labs and symptoms don't support TRT, your provider will explain why and discuss alternative approaches.

Start with an evaluation

Get a clear, lab-based picture of where you stand — no pressure, no sales pitch.

Book a Visit

Telehealth medical care across Florida. Cash pay, no insurance. Same-week appointments.
